---
title: "Practice 6a - Worksheet manipulation"
author: "Dr. Bartosiak"
---

# Practie video 6a

::: {.callout-tip title="Windows" collapse="true"}
{{< video https://youtu.be/m9W9DX3P2O8 title="Practice 6a Windows" >}}
:::

::: {.callout-tip title="Mac" collapse="true"}
{{< video https://youtu.be/1W5m5c9XhfE title="Practice 6a Mac" >}}
:::

## Answer key

[Answer key](/_files/keys/key_intromis-6-a_1.xlsx){target="_blank"}

# Instructions

[Starter Workbook](/_files/starters/starter_intromis-6-a.xlsx){target="_blank"}

## Tasks and Steps

1.  Download and open the starter file.
2.	Prevent all editing to the Chain Market Data and the Pizza Sales Data worksheets by protecting them. [Mac](https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/office/protect-a-worksheet-in-mac-9ef52175-aaeb-4471-88d7-acdad93819c5) [Win](https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/office/protect-a-worksheet-3179efdb-1285-4d49-a9c3-f4ca36276de6)
3.	Transform the table in the Market Calculations and in the Pizza Sales Calculations worksheets into a range. [Mac](https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/office/convert-an-excel-table-to-a-range-of-data-0b326ff1-1764-4ebe-84ea-786265d41c77) [Win](https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/office/convert-an-excel-table-to-a-range-of-data-0b326ff1-1764-4ebe-84ea-786265d41c77)
4.	Freeze the Top row in the Pizza Sales Calculations worksheet. [Mac](https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/office/freeze-panes-to-lock-the-first-row-or-column-in-excel-for-mac-b8eb717e-9d3e-4354-8c02-d779a4b404b2) [Win](https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/office/freeze-panes-to-lock-the-first-row-or-column-in-excel-for-mac-b8eb717e-9d3e-4354-8c02-d779a4b404b2)
5. Save the file and close it.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

```{=html}
<style>
.disclaimer {
  font-size: 0.8em;
  color: #666;
  border-top: 1px solid #ddd;
  padding-top: 10px;
  margin-top: 20px;
}
</style>
```

```{=html}
<div>
  {{< include footer.html >}}
</div>
```
